summary: Upbeat show highlighted by an ascendant Foolish Heart; recording source and quality are not detailed.
review: The reviewer remembers a high‑energy performance of “Foolish Heart” with great vibes and excellent seats, noting that Jerry Garcia brushed off a frisbee hit to his kneecap and kept playing. No information about the audio source or fidelity was given, so the recording quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 4‑star review focusing on the show’s vibe and a standout Foolish Heart; no data on recording quality, leading to moderate confidence in rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention any aspects of sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer describes a generally positive atmosphere, though mentions a frisbee incident that some felt briefly affected the vibe.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Hit on his kneecap by a frisbee but continued playing; some later listeners thought it hurt the vibe.
